name: penumbra-studio
description: Penumbra Rhino Studio debug suite — drives the STANDALONE studio commands (no Grasshopper/Slop/CPig): PenumbraSphere (baseline) then PenumbraGyroid, each auto-fit-framed, gated on a real converged frame, capturing the conduit's active.png. The deterministic in-Rhino reproduction loop for studio-command debugging (replaces manual click-in-Rhino + read-telemetry). Requires the Penumbra Rhino plug-in registered for auto-load. Pair the candidate PNGs with %LocalAppData%\Penumbra\preview\telemetry.ndjson (insert.*/fit.auto/frame.real/error).
